english: The morning air is especially fresh.

sentence: 编辑正在修订这本书的第二版。
pinyin: Biānjí zhèngzài xiū dìng zhè běn shū de dì èr bǎn.
english: The editor is revising the second edition of this book.

sentence: 请按照类别把这些书整理好。
pinyin: Qǐng ànzhào lèibié bǎ zhèxiē shū zhěnglǐ hǎo.
english: Please sort these books by category.

sentence: 这款手机的厂商宣布下个月发布新型号。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī de chǎngshāng xuānbù xià gè yuè fābù xīn xínghào.
english: The manufacturer of this phone announced that a new model will be released next month.

sentence: 政府用税收来建设公共设施。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ yòng shuìshōu lái jiànshè gōnggòng shèshī.
english: The government uses tax revenue to build public facilities.
